name: Triple Chocolate Fondue- Jeanne Elledge
recipeIngredient: 1 package (or 2 cups) semi-sweet chocolate chips or chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in a double boiler, microwave, or over very low heat, stirring frequently to prevent scorching. The melted chocolate should be creamy but not soupy.
2. Use the fondue to dip various fruits such as apple, banana, strawberries, pineapple, kiwi, oranges, etc., or pound cake and ladyfingers for a sweet treat.
